name: 🪓 KILL BIVE !! - REGRETEVATOR
description:
TAKE THE TOURGUIDE'S CHALLENGE!

NOTE 8/21

"Bive is funny. Very, very funny. Funnier than her girlfriend, albeit not intentionally. The way she moves is all awkward, and you can tell she's been in a room from how it smells. What a shame. When I was told there was a detective on this elevator, I expected something more like from the noir films."
"But don't forget. She is just as capable."
("Hmh... you want her gone, AND her girlfriend? This one was easy to arrange, but it'll be some time before you reach splitsville..")

Paranoid, potentially schizophrenic, neurotic, medical condition medical condition medical condition. But is that all Bive really is? She had a point with the dream parasite, maybe she has a point with the clown militia, and she definitely has a point tying you to the murders. Don't get caught.

I DON'T CARE HOW YOU DO IT OR WHAT YOUR MOTIVATION IS, KILL BIVE!!

I can't control what you do, but don't be weird.

feel free to request a regretevator character to be the next target!
creator: LeonBeSimping
